name: ImposterGate
short: Kicks members who change their name to match blocked admin/staff patterns.
description: Automatically removes members who change their username or display name to something matching a configurable set of regex patterns, protecting against admin/staff impersonation. Admins and whitelisted moderator roles are never kicked.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any end-user data. Member IDs and usernames are logged transiently to the bot's logger and, if configured, to a guild audit-log channel.
author: ranchcogs
install_msg:
Thanks for installing ImposterGate!

**Required:** Enable the Server Members privileged intent in the Discord Developer Portal and in your bot's intents. The bot also needs the Kick Members permission with a role above those it will kick.

Load with: `[p]load impostergate`
Then use `/usernameguard status` to verify it is active.
